_comment: Agent sync configuration. The .ai/ folder is the single source of truth.

_pathArrayConvention._comment: Multi-path fields (skills, globalSkills) are ordered arrays. Position 0 is the PREFERRED/PRIMARY target — the sync script mirrors only there. Positions 1+ are OBSOLETE alternative paths the agent may still read but the script will not write to. They are scanned during sync and reported for cleanup. Migration is just reordering or prepending: e.g. once Claude Code adds `.agents/skills/` support, change [".claude/skills"] to [".agents/skills", ".claude/skills"] and the next sync mirrors to the new primary while flagging the legacy folder as obsolete. Multiple agents may share the same primary path (e.g. `.agents/skills`); the script deduplicates so it mirrors once.

_sharedFolderConvention._comment: Universal `.agents/` folder convention shared across compatible AI tools (Codex CLI, GitHub Copilot, Roo Code, Kilo Code, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, etc.). Standardised in early 2026 alongside the Agent Skills open spec. To opt an agent in, just put `.agents/skills` (or `{UserProfile}/.agents/skills`) at position 0 of its skills/globalSkills array. Sources: agentskills.io, opencode.ai/docs/skills, geminicli.com/docs/cli/skills, developers.openai.com/codex/skills, code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/customization/agent-skills.
_sharedFolderConvention.instructionsConvention: AGENTS.md / GEMINI.md at repository root (no `.agents/instructions/` subfolder is widely adopted).
_sharedFolderConvention.agentsConvention: No widely-adopted `.agents/agents/` convention; custom-mode formats remain agent-specific.
_sharedFolderConvention.mcpConvention: Each agent uses its own MCP config file (e.g. `.roo/mcp.json`, `.claude/settings.json`). Recorded here for reference only - MCP sync is NOT performed by this script.

agents.name: Roo Code
agents._comment: Sunset announced 2026-04-21; products shut down 2026-05-15. Recommended migration: Kilo Code or Cline.

agents.name: Claude Code
agents._comment: Does NOT yet support the universal `.agents/` convention. To opt in once Anthropic adds support, prepend `.agents/skills` to the skills array.

agents.name: Kilo Code
agents._comment: Open-source fork of Roo Code + Cline. Apache-2.0. BYOK any provider; optional account for free credits. Preferred paths use `.kilo/`; `.kilocode/` is the legacy Roo-style backward-compat path that the script flags as obsolete if present.

agents.name: Gemini CLI
agents._comment: Google's open-source CLI agent. Uses GEMINI.md at the repo root for instructions (single-file convention, like AGENTS.md). Reads `.agents/skills/` and `~/.agents/skills/` aliases as primary; `.gemini/skills/` and `~/.gemini/skills/` are the legacy fallbacks.
